Join the Lab

Opportunities

We are actively recruiting talented and motivated researchers at all levels. Our lab offers a collaborative, rigorous, and supportive environment at the intersection of physics, computation, and clinical impact.

Open Graduate

PhD Student (Fall 2025 / Spring 2026)

We are seeking PhD students with backgrounds in biomedical engineering, computer science, medical physics, or a related field. Strong programming skills (Python) and interest in medical imaging are required. Experience with deep learning or CT simulation is a plus.

Requirements

  • ✓BS/MS in BME, CS, Physics, or related field
  • ✓Python proficiency
  • ✓Strong mathematical background
  • ✓Interest in medical imaging AI
Apply via Email →
Open Postdoc

Postdoctoral Researcher

We seek a postdoc with expertise in deep learning for medical imaging, ideally with experience in generative models, foundation models, or CT simulation. The postdoc will lead independent research projects and co-mentor graduate students.

Requirements

  • ✓PhD in CS, BME, Medical Physics, or related
  • ✓Strong publication record
  • ✓Experience with PyTorch or JAX
  • ✓Medical imaging or simulation background
Apply via Email →
Open Masters

MS Student / Research Assistant

Current UA graduate students interested in joining the lab for thesis research or as research assistants are encouraged to reach out.

Requirements

  • ✓Enrolled at University of Arizona
  • ✓Programming background
  • ✓Motivated self-starter
Apply via Email →
Open Undergraduate

Undergraduate Researcher

Exceptional UA undergraduates interested in research can apply for part-time positions. Commitment of at least 10 hours/week is expected.

Requirements

  • ✓UA undergraduate
  • ✓GPA ≥ 3.5
  • ✓Background in CS or engineering
Apply via Email →

How to Apply

Send an email to ftushar@arizona.edu with subject line '[Position] – Your Name'. Include your CV, a brief statement of research interests (1 page), and any relevant code samples or publications.

Questions?

Feel free to reach out to Dr. Tushar directly for any inquiries about lab fit, research directions, or funding.

Email Dr. Tushar
